label: Journal / Reflect
description: The item triggers emotional conflict, avoidance, guilt, fear, or unresolved meaning. Pause and process before deciding.
notes: Attach journaling prompts or emotional processing resources here.

label: Keep
description: The item is meaningful, useful, aligned with your future, or essential to your life.

label: Destroy / Shred
description: The item contains sensitive personal information or must be securely destroyed.

label: Trash
description: The item is unusable, unsafe, unsanitary, broken beyond repair, or non‑donatable.

label: Recycle
description: The item is recyclable and not suitable for donation or reuse.

label: Donate
description: The item is in good condition and can be used by someone else.

label: Rehome
description: The item is a living thing or something requiring ongoing care that you cannot provide.

label: Hazardous Waste
description: The item is hazardous (batteries, chemicals, sharps, electronics) and must be disposed of safely.
notes: Add hazardous waste disposal info here.

label: Sell
description: The item has resale value and is worth the time and effort to list.
notes: Add selling platforms or tips here.

label: Return to Owner
description: The item does not belong to you and must be returned or ownership clarified.

label: Digitize, Then Release
description: The meaning can be preserved digitally without keeping the physical item.
notes: Add digitization tools or instructions here.

label: Repair / Upcycle
description: The item can be repaired, repurposed, or upcycled instead of discarded.
notes: Add repair resources or upcycling ideas here.
